Description: Our Olive oil Soaps do not contain silicones or other foaming agents (chemicals). They are made with olive oil of exceptional quality, herbal extracts, natural essential oils and cocoa butter for extra foam. Our soaps are prepared with a cold method, for example the oil is not boiled, and therefore its valuable components are not destroyed. They contain all the glycerin generated during the process of saponification as well as unsaponifiable oil molecules that cleanse, moisturize and nourish the skin and leave it incredibly soft, shiny and toned. They are antiseptic, anti-fungal and healing to cuts, abrasions and wounds. They clean thoroughly the skin and remove makeup without over-drying or stripping skin of its natural oils. The combinations of the herbs are made according to their healing properties for each skin face type.
